title: 2026-07-10｜Daily English

words.sentence: The eligibility rules should be checked before showing the offer.
The approval workflow needs a clear fallback when the request fails.
The next project milestone is to finish the checkout prototype.
This feature has an external dependency on the payment API.
Show a retry button when a request timeout happens.
The pagination logic should keep the selected filters after loading more results.
Please send a follow-up note after the product review meeting.
I want to raise a concern about the release timeline.

words.meaning: 中转停留；转机等待时间
words.sentence: A short layover may increase the risk of missing the connection.
Checked baggage rules should be visible before users confirm the flight.

focus: 动态复习：今天优先强化 constraint / handoff / edge case / latency / rollback，继续把它们放进真实前端发布和产品评审语境里。
技术表达：用 dependency / timeout / pagination 描述接口依赖、请求失败和列表加载，例如 The request timeout should trigger a fallback UI.
业务流程：用 eligibility / workflow / milestone 讲清楚规则、流程和项目节点，避免只会说 requirement。
沟通与旅行：用 follow-up / concern 表达会后跟进和风险顾虑；用 layover / baggage 描述转机和行李规则。
